name: ddl-constraint-builder
description: Infer PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, NOT NULL, and CHECK constraints from Enhanced JSON Schema metadata
acceptanceCriteria: inferPrimaryKey(model) returns property with x-mst-type: 'identifier' per req-ddl-primary-keys
Throws error if no identifier found or multiple identifiers exist
inferNotNull(property, required[]) returns true if property in required array per req-ddl-not-null
Identifier properties always NOT NULL regardless of required array
inferForeignKey(property, model) returns ForeignKeyDef for x-reference-type: 'single' per req-ddl-single-refs
FK column name derived from x-reference-target using snake_case(target) + '_id' pattern
FK onDelete is CASCADE for required refs, SET NULL for optional refs
inferCheckConstraint(property) returns CHECK clause for enum properties per req-ddl-enum-checks
Skips properties with x-computed: true (computed fields not stored)
